name: Daldøs
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Daldøs (Daldøsa): a traditional Scandinavian boat-shaped 'running-fight' dice game. Roll two four-sided long dice (1 = the 'dal', 2, 3, 4) and race your pieces around three rows of holes — your home row, the shared middle row, then the enemy's row — never returning home. A piece is dead in its hole until 'dalled' (activated by a roll of 1); only a dalled, moving piece may capture. Land exactly on an enemy piece to remove it for good. Remove ALL the opponent's pieces to win.
